description:
Live per-process network traffic monitor.

QNetwork is a Windows desktop tool for live per-process network traffic monitoring using ETW. It shows active process totals, in/out rates, session totals, peaks, and active connections, plus a 60-second traffic history chart with process-level grouping and filtering. It also supports CSV export, tray minimization, adapter filtering, and alert thresholds. Per-process collection uses ETW kernel tracing and requires administrator rights.
Patch release focused on installer correctness, release automation, and operator-facing polish.
Highlights
- Fixes MSI packaging so the installer includes the required WPF and native runtime files.
- Improves installer metadata for Windows Apps & Features and support links.
- Adds a Start menu shortcut through the MSI installer.
- Adds CLI help output and validates that --json is only used with --once.
- Polishes the desktop status bar, empty-state messaging, unit labels, and CSV export feedback.
Packaging
- Builds as a self-contained win-x64 MSI.
- Keeps the stable installer UpgradeCode for upgrades from earlier versions.
